_meta.note: Real professional history for Mohamed Amine MIDENI. Keep this file in sync with experience.fr.json (same ids, same order, same current flags). projectSlug links an entry to a case study in src/content/projects/. VERIFY: exact months, cities, and company spellings (Codemize Solution / Midani IT) are best-effort — adjust as needed.

items.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer — Personal & Open-Source Projects
bullets: Designed and shipped full-stack applications end to end: distributed backends (Node.js, Fastify, Spring Boot), React/TypeScript frontends, Docker & CI/CD
Built real-time systems (Socket.IO), event-driven microservices, and an AI-powered IoT monitoring platform (LSTM, Random Forest)
Applying test automation (Selenium, Postman, JUnit) and quality-first practices across projects

items.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer — End-of-Studies Internship (PFE)
bullets: End-of-studies internship (PFE): built Mallify, an event-driven e-commerce marketplace decomposed into 18+ independent microservices
Implemented services in Node.js with per-service MongoDB data ownership and event-driven communication through a message broker
Containerized every service with Docker & Docker Compose for independent deployment and service-by-service scaling

items.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer — Summer Internship
bullets: Summer internship: developed VitaSensor, a real-time smart-hospital platform streaming patient vital signs over WebSockets (Socket.IO)
Built a multi-role React/TypeScript frontend (admin, doctor, nurse) on a Node.js/Express + PostgreSQL (Prisma) backend with JWT authentication
Integrated Python AI/ML models (LSTM, Random Forest, Isolation Forest) to predict patient risk and drive a multi-level alerting workflow

items.title: Software Engineer — Annual Project Internship (PFA)
bullets: Annual project internship (PFA): built Shoofli, a role-based services marketplace connecting clients with local technicians
Developed a React + TypeScript single-page app with distinct client, technician, and admin experiences — publications, in-app contact, and notifications

items.title: Freelance Full-Stack Web Developer
bullets: Delivered custom web platforms and applications for clients end to end — from conception and UI/UX design through development and deployment
Built restaurant platforms, a delivery application, and e-commerce websites tailored to each client's business
Managed the full project lifecycle independently: requirements gathering, design, frontend & backend development, and client delivery
